title: Large Tuberculosis Outbreaks - United States, 2017-2023
snippet: This report describes 50 large tuberculosis outbreaks in 23 states during 2017-2023.

title: Influenza Vaccination Coverage Among Nursing Home Residents and Health Care Personnel - United States, 2024-25 Influenza Season
snippet: This report describes flu vaccination coverage among nursing home residents and health care providers working in nursing homes.

title: Clusters of Invasive Haemophilus influenzae Type b Disease Among Adults Using Substances or Experiencing Homelessness or Housing Instability - Alaska, Oregon, and Washington, 2023─2025
snippet: This report describes two clusters of invasive of Haemophilus influenzae type b among adults with special risk factors in Alaska, Oregon, and Washington.

title: Influenza and COVID-19 Vaccination Coverage Among Health Care Personnel - United States, 2024-25 Respiratory Virus Season
snippet: This report describes influenza and COVID-19 vaccination coverage among health care providers in the United States during the 2024-25 respiratory virus season.

title: Early Detection and Surveillance of the SARS-CoV-2 Variant BA.3.2 - Worldwide, November 2024-February 2026
snippet: This report describes early detection and surveillance of the SARS-CoV-2 variant BA.3.2.

title: Interim Estimates of 2025-26 Seasonal Influenza Vaccine Effectiveness - California, October 2025-January 2026
snippet: This report describes interim estimates of 2025-26 flu vaccine effectiveness in California during October 2025-January 2026.

title: Interim Estimates of 2025-26 Seasonal Influenza Vaccine Effectiveness - United States, September 2025-February 2026
snippet: This report describes interim estimates of 2025-26 seasonal flu vaccine effectiveness.

title: Respiratory Virus Activity - United States, July 1, 2024-June 30, 2025
snippet: This report describes respiratory virus activity in the United States during July 1, 2024-June 30, 2025.

title: COVID-19 Antiviral Prescription Receipt Among Outpatients Aged ≥65 Years - United States, June 1, 2023-September 30, 2025
snippet: This report describes receipt of COVID-19 antiviral prescriptions among outpatients aged 65 and older from June 1, 2023-September 30, 2025.

title: Notes from the Field: Maximizing Tuberculosis Testing After a School-Based Exposure - Lake County, Illinois, 2025
snippet: This report describes the prevalence of physical and sexual violence perpetration by young men and associations of these events with their exposure to violence during childhood.

title: United States Completes WHO Withdrawal
snippet: U.S. exits WHO, citing COVID-19 failures, politicization, and shift to bilateral health efforts.

title: Continuity of Care for Patients with Tuberculosis Relocating to Other Countries - CureTB Program, 2016-2023
snippet: This report evaluates CureTB program performance during 2016-2023.

title: Effectiveness of 2024-2025 COVID-19 Vaccines in Children in the United States - VISION, August 29, 2024-September 2, 2025
snippet: This report describes COVID-19 vaccine effectiveness among children ages 9 months to 17 years.

title: Notes from the Field: Expanding Birthing Hospital Enrollment in the Vaccines for Children Program to Increase Infant Immunization Against Respiratory Syncytial Virus - United States, October 2023-March 2025
snippet: This report describes a CDC collaboration with professional organizations and health departments to enroll birthing hospitals in the Vaccines for Children Program to increase infant immunization against respiratory syncy

title: Nirsevimab Effectiveness Against Intensive Care Unit Admission for Respiratory Syncytial Virus in Infants - 24 States, December 2024-April 2025
snippet: This report describes a multicenter case-control investigation that found nirsevimab was 80% effective at preventing RSV-associated ICU admissions among infants.
